languages.text: Конвеер предназначен для транспортировки мертвых тел к утилизационному агрегату. Металлическая поверхность покрыта отвратительного вида потеками.

traits.locale_text: Конвеер предназначен для транспортировки мёртвых тел к утилизационному агрегату. Металлическая поверхность покрыта неаппетитными потёками.

languages.text: The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.
languages.original_text: Конвеер предназначен для транспортировки мертвых тел к утилизационному агрегату. Металлическая поверхность покрыта отвратительного вида потеками.

traits.locale_text: The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.
The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.
The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.

languages.text: 遺体を処理場に運ぶためのベルトコンベア。金属の表面には、不快な汚れが浮かんでいる。
languages.original_text: The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.

languages.text: Konveyör, cesetleri imha ünitesine taşımak için tasarlanmış. Metal yüzeyi, iğrenç görünümlü lekelerle kaplı.
languages.original_text: The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.

traits.locale_text: Konveyör, cesetleri imha ünitesine taşımak için tasarlanmış. Metal yüzeyi, iğrenç görünümlü lekelerle kaplı.

languages.text: 传送带用于将尸体运输至处理单位。金属表面覆满令人不适的污渍。
languages.original_text: The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.

traits.locale_text: 传送带用于将尸体运输至处理单位。金属表面覆满令人不适的污渍。

languages.text: Das Förderband transportiert Leichen zur Entsorgungseinheit. Die metallische Oberfläche ist mit abstoßenden Flecken bedeckt.
languages.original_text: The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.

traits.locale_text: Das Förderband transportiert Leichen zur Entsorgungseinheit. Die metallische Oberfläche ist mit abstoßenden Flecken bedeckt.

languages.text: Ce convoyeur transporte les cadavres vers l'unité d'élimination. Sa surface en métal est recouverte de taches répugnantes.
languages.original_text: The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.

traits.locale_text: Ce convoyeur transporte les cadavres vers l'unité d'élimination. Sa surface en métal est recouverte de taches répugnantes.

languages.text: Esta cinta transportadora está hecha para transportar cadáveres a la unidad de eliminación. La superficie de metal está cubierta de manchas repugnantes.
languages.original_text: The conveyor is designed to transport dead bodies to the disposal unit. The metal surface is covered in repulsive-looking stains.
